Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class TradeAllocation.Builder

java.lang.Object

  • Method Details

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public TradeAllocation.Builder accruedInterestAmount(TradeAllocationAccruedInterestAmount accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of interest that has been accrued in the issuing currency for a single instrument.

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public TradeAllocation.Builder accruedInterestAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TradeAllocationAccruedInterestAmount> accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of interest that has been accrued in the issuing currency for a single instrument.

    • additionalInstructions

      public TradeAllocation.Builder additionalInstructions(String additionalInstructions)
      Free form instructions that can be used to provide additional instructions (that are not captured by existing special instructions) and will be put on the trade confirm.

    • additionalInstructions

      public TradeAllocation.Builder additionalInstructions(Optional<String> additionalInstructions)
      Free form instructions that can be used to provide additional instructions (that are not captured by existing special instructions) and will be put on the trade confirm.

    • assetType

      public TradeAllocation.Builder assetType(TradeAllocationAssetType assetType)
      Type of the asset being traded.

    • assetType

      public TradeAllocation.Builder assetType(Optional<? extends TradeAllocationAssetType> assetType)
      Type of the asset being traded.

    • bondYield

      public TradeAllocation.Builder bondYield(List<BondYield> bondYield)
      The yield associated with an individual fill of a fixed income trade. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • bondYield

      public TradeAllocation.Builder bondYield(Optional<? extends List<BondYield>> bondYield)
      The yield associated with an individual fill of a fixed income trade. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • brokerCapacity

      public TradeAllocation.Builder brokerCapacity(TradeAllocationBrokerCapacity brokerCapacity)
      Broker capacity for the trade.

    • brokerCapacity

      public TradeAllocation.Builder brokerCapacity(Optional<? extends TradeAllocationBrokerCapacity> brokerCapacity)
      Broker capacity for the trade.

    • clientOrderId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder clientOrderId(String clientOrderId)
      The unique identifier that is associated with an order. This is useful for associating the trade allocation with the original trade. This will be assigned a unique UUID if not provided.

    • clientOrderId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder clientOrderId(Optional<String> clientOrderId)
      The unique identifier that is associated with an order. This is useful for associating the trade allocation with the original trade. This will be assigned a unique UUID if not provided.

    • commissionAmount

      public TradeAllocation.Builder commissionAmount(TradeAllocationCommissionAmount commissionAmount)
      Commission amount of the trade allocation that will only be applied to the to_account_id.

    • commissionAmount

      public TradeAllocation.Builder commissionAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TradeAllocationCommissionAmount> commissionAmount)
      Commission amount of the trade allocation that will only be applied to the to_account_id.

    • executionTime

      public TradeAllocation.Builder executionTime(OffsetDateTime executionTime)
      Timestamp of when the trade allocation took place. If settlement_date is not provided, this field will be converted into Eastern Time and used to calculate settlement_date.

    • executionTime

      public TradeAllocation.Builder executionTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> executionTime)
      Timestamp of when the trade allocation took place. If settlement_date is not provided, this field will be converted into Eastern Time and used to calculate settlement_date.

    • fees

      public TradeAllocation.Builder fees(List<BookingFee> fees)
      Client calculated fees that will only be applied to the to_account_id. Regulatory fees will be calculated automatically if they are not explicitly overwritten or suppressed.

    • fees

      public TradeAllocation.Builder fees(Optional<? extends List<BookingFee>> fees)
      Client calculated fees that will only be applied to the to_account_id. Regulatory fees will be calculated automatically if they are not explicitly overwritten or suppressed.

    • fromAccountId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder fromAccountId(String fromAccountId)
      The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved from.

    • fromAccountId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder fromAccountId(Optional<String> fromAccountId)
      The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved from.

    • fromActivityId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder fromActivityId(String fromActivityId)
      The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved from in the Ledger.

    • fromActivityId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder fromActivityId(Optional<String> fromActivityId)
      The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved from in the Ledger.

    • grossAmount

      public TradeAllocation.Builder grossAmount(TradeAllocationGrossAmount grossAmount)
      Gross amount is calculated by the Booking service by multiplying price and quantity and fixing it to 2 fractional precision. Optionally specifiable. If present, will override the gross_amount calculated above.

    • grossAmount

      public TradeAllocation.Builder grossAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TradeAllocationGrossAmount> grossAmount)
      Gross amount is calculated by the Booking service by multiplying price and quantity and fixing it to 2 fractional precision. Optionally specifiable. If present, will override the gross_amount calculated above.

    • identifier

      public TradeAllocation.Builder identifier(String identifier)
      Identifier (of the type specified in `identifier_type`). Responses will supply the originally requested identifier.

    • identifier

      public TradeAllocation.Builder identifier(Optional<String> identifier)
      Identifier (of the type specified in `identifier_type`). Responses will supply the originally requested identifier.

    • identifierType

      public TradeAllocation.Builder identifierType(TradeAllocationIdentifierType identifierType)
      Identifier type for the asset being traded.

    • identifierType

      public TradeAllocation.Builder identifierType(Optional<? extends TradeAllocationIdentifierType> identifierType)
      Identifier type for the asset being traded.

    • issuingRegionCode

      public TradeAllocation.Builder issuingRegionCode(String issuingRegionCode)
      Unicode CLDR region code. Issuing Region Code is required for some `identifier_type`s, especially CUSIP.

    • issuingRegionCode

      public TradeAllocation.Builder issuingRegionCode(Optional<String> issuingRegionCode)
      Unicode CLDR region code. Issuing Region Code is required for some `identifier_type`s, especially CUSIP.

    • lotMatchingInstructions

      public TradeAllocation.Builder lotMatchingInstructions(List<BookingLot> lotMatchingInstructions)
      One or many lot matching instructions for the trade allocation.

    • lotMatchingInstructions

      public TradeAllocation.Builder lotMatchingInstructions(Optional<? extends List<BookingLot>> lotMatchingInstructions)
      One or many lot matching instructions for the trade allocation.

    • memo

      public TradeAllocation.Builder memo(String memo)
      Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.

    • memo

      public TradeAllocation.Builder memo(Optional<String> memo)
      Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.

    • name

      public TradeAllocation.Builder name(String name)
      The resource name of the trade allocation.

    • name

      public TradeAllocation.Builder name(Optional<String> name)
      The resource name of the trade allocation.

    • prevailingMarketPrice

      public TradeAllocation.Builder prevailingMarketPrice(TradeAllocationPrevailingMarketPrice prevailingMarketPrice)
      The price for the instrument that is prevailing in the market. Required for FIXED_INCOME trade allocations when the broker_capacity is PRINCIPAL.

    • prevailingMarketPrice

      public TradeAllocation.Builder prevailingMarketPrice(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TradeAllocationPrevailingMarketPrice> prevailingMarketPrice)
      The price for the instrument that is prevailing in the market. Required for FIXED_INCOME trade allocations when the broker_capacity is PRINCIPAL.

    • price

      public TradeAllocation.Builder price(TradeAllocationPrice price)
      Price with requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision.

      public TradeAllocation.Builder price(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TradeAllocationPrice> price)
      Price with requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision.

    • priceAdjustment

      public TradeAllocation.Builder priceAdjustment(TradeAllocationPriceAdjustment priceAdjustment)
      Price adjustment that will be applied to the net price of the security.

    • priceAdjustment

      public TradeAllocation.Builder priceAdjustment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TradeAllocationPriceAdjustment> priceAdjustment)
      Price adjustment that will be applied to the net price of the security.

    • quantity

      public TradeAllocation.Builder quantity(TradeAllocationQuantity quantity)
      Quantity with requirement of 12 or less integral number and 5 or less fractional precision.

    • quantity

      public TradeAllocation.Builder quantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TradeAllocationQuantity> quantity)
      Quantity with requirement of 12 or less integral number and 5 or less fractional precision.

    • settlementDate

      public TradeAllocation.Builder settlementDate(TradeAllocationSettlementDate settlementDate)
      Defaults to T+1 for equities if this is not provided. Calculated using the execution_time field in Eastern Time.

    • settlementDate

      public TradeAllocation.Builder settlementDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TradeAllocationSettlementDate> settlementDate)
      Defaults to T+1 for equities if this is not provided. Calculated using the execution_time field in Eastern Time.

    • sideModifier

      public TradeAllocation.Builder sideModifier(TradeAllocationSideModifier sideModifier)
      Side modifier for the trade allocation.

    • sideModifier

      public TradeAllocation.Builder sideModifier(Optional<? extends TradeAllocationSideModifier> sideModifier)
      Side modifier for the trade allocation.

      public TradeAllocation.Builder sourceApplication(String sourceApplication)
      The source of the submission.

    • sourceApplication

      public TradeAllocation.Builder sourceApplication(Optional<String> sourceApplication)
      The source of the submission.

    • specialInstructions

      public TradeAllocation.Builder specialInstructions(List<TradeAllocationSpecialInstructions> specialInstructions)
      An enumerated list of values used to indicate certain attributes about a trade allocation (E.g. BROKER_LIQUIDATION) and/or trigger downstream processing rules (e.g. SUPPRESS_TRACE_REPORTING)

    • specialInstructions

      public TradeAllocation.Builder specialInstructions(Optional<? extends List<TradeAllocationSpecialInstructions>> specialInstructions)
      An enumerated list of values used to indicate certain attributes about a trade allocation (E.g. BROKER_LIQUIDATION) and/or trigger downstream processing rules (e.g. SUPPRESS_TRACE_REPORTING)

    • state

      public TradeAllocation.Builder state(TradeAllocationState state)
      The state that the trade allocation is in.

    • state

      public TradeAllocation.Builder state(Optional<? extends TradeAllocationState> state)
      The state that the trade allocation is in.

    • toAccountId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder toAccountId(String toAccountId)
      The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved to.

    • toAccountId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder toAccountId(Optional<String> toAccountId)
      The ULID formatted account_id that the positions will be moved to.

    • toActivityId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder toActivityId(String toActivityId)
      The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved to in the Ledger.

    • toActivityId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder toActivityId(Optional<String> toActivityId)
      The current activity_id of the trade allocation that positions will be moved to in the Ledger.

    • toSide

      public TradeAllocation.Builder toSide(TradeAllocationToSide toSide)
      Denotes the side of the position going into the to_account_id. A to_side of SELL indicates the position will be allocated with a BUY out of the from_account, and a SELL into the to_account.

    • toSide

      public TradeAllocation.Builder toSide(Optional<? extends TradeAllocationToSide> toSide)
      Denotes the side of the position going into the to_account_id. A to_side of SELL indicates the position will be allocated with a BUY out of the from_account, and a SELL into the to_account.

    • tradeAllocationId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder tradeAllocationId(String tradeAllocationId)
      A ULID to uniquely identify the trade allocation globally.

    • tradeAllocationId

      public TradeAllocation.Builder tradeAllocationId(Optional<String> tradeAllocationId)
      A ULID to uniquely identify the trade allocation globally.

    • whenIssued

      public TradeAllocation.Builder whenIssued(TradeAllocationWhenIssued whenIssued)
      Denotes that this trade allocation was either when_issued or when_distributed.

    • whenIssued

      public TradeAllocation.Builder whenIssued(Optional<? extends TradeAllocationWhenIssued> whenIssued)
      Denotes that this trade allocation was either when_issued or when_distributed.
